English: How we collect, use and protect your data when you enquire about Lexis Hibiscus 2, Port Dickson.

English: How we collect, use and protect your data when you enquire about Lexis Hibiscus 2.
Chinese (ZH): 了解我们在您咨询 Lexis Hibiscus 2 时，如何收集、使用及保护您的个人资料。
法律信息
Notes: Same string as disclaimer.eyebrow

Chinese (ZH): 隐私政策
最后更新日期：2026年7月10日
Notes: Keep the same date across all languages — localize only the date format/wording, not the date itself

Chinese (ZH): 1. 本政策涵盖范围

English: This policy explains how hibiscus2.com ("this website") collects and uses information when you browse the site or submit an enquiry about Lexis Hibiscus 2, Port Dickson. This website is operated by an authorised real estate negotiator marketing the project — it is not the developer's official website.
Chinese (ZH): 本政策说明当您浏览本网站或提交有关 Lexis Hibiscus 2（Port Dickson）的咨询时，hibiscus2.com（"本网站"）如何收集及使用相关信息。本网站由负责该项目市场推广的授权房地产经纪人营运——并非发展商官方网站。
2. 我们收集的信息

English: When you submit the enquiry form or contact us on WhatsApp, we collect: your name, WhatsApp number, buyer type (e.g. Malaysia Buyer, Singapore Buyer, Overseas Buyer, MM2H Participant), and any message you provide. Form submissions are processed via Web3Forms and delivered to our consultant by email.
Chinese (ZH): 当您提交咨询表格或透过 WhatsApp 联系我们时，我们会收集：您的姓名、WhatsApp 号码、买家类型（例如马来西亚买家、新加坡买家、海外买家、MM2H 参与者），以及您提供的任何留言。表格提交内容将透过 Web3Forms 处理，并以电邮方式发送给我们的顾问。

English: We also automatically collect standard analytics data (pages visited, device type, approximate location, referring source and, where present, UTM/gclid campaign parameters) via Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics (GA4).
Chinese (ZH): 我们也会透过 Google Tag Manager 与 Google Analytics（GA4）自动收集标准分析数据（包括浏览页面、设备类型、大致位置、来源渠道，以及（如有）UTM/gclid 广告活动参数）。
3. 我们如何使用您的信息

English: We use the information you provide solely to respond to your enquiry — to contact you on WhatsApp or by phone/email with villa details, pricing, and to arrange a consultation. Analytics data is used to understand site performance and to measure the effectiveness of Google Ads campaigns (conversion tracking).
Chinese (ZH): 我们仅使用您所提供的信息来回复您的咨询——透过 WhatsApp、电话或电邮与您联系，提供别墅详情、价格资讯，并安排咨询。分析数据则用于了解网站表现，并衡量 Google Ads 广告活动成效（转化追踪）。
4. Cookie 与追踪技术

English: This website uses Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics (GA4) and Google Ads conversion tracking, which may set cookies or similar technologies in your browser to measure site usage and ad performance. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
Chinese (ZH): 本网站使用 Google Tag Manager、Google Analytics（GA4）及 Google Ads 转化追踪，这些工具可能会在您的浏览器中设置 Cookie 或类似技术，以衡量网站使用情况及广告成效。您可透过浏览器设置管理 Cookie。
5. 信息分享

English: Your enquiry details are shared only with the consultant/agency handling your enquiry and, where relevant, the project developer for the purpose of following up on your interest. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
Chinese (ZH): 您的咨询资料仅会与处理该咨询的顾问／代理公司分享，并在相关情况下与项目发展商分享，以便跟进您的意向。我们不会将您的个人资料出售予第三方。
6. 资料保留

English: We retain enquiry information for as long as reasonably necessary to respond to your enquiry and for legitimate business record-keeping, unless you request deletion sooner.
Chinese (ZH): 我们会在合理必要的期限内保留您的咨询信息，以回复咨询及作为正当的业务记录用途，除非您要求提前删除。
7. 您的权利

English: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us via WhatsApp or the details on our Contact page, in accordance with the Malaysian Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA).
Chinese (ZH): 根据马来西亚2010年个人资料保护法令（PDPA），您可透过 WhatsApp 或我们联系我们页面上的资料与我们联系，要求查阅、更正或删除您的个人资料。
Notes: "Contact page"/"联系我们" is a hyperlink to /contact/ (language-equivalent). "PDPA" is Malaysia-specific law — keep the Act name reference, translate surrounding text

Chinese (ZH): 1. 仅供营销参考

English: hibiscus2.com is marketing material produced by an authorised real estate negotiator ("we", "us") for Lexis Hibiscus 2, Port Dickson. This is not the developer's official website. Nothing on this site constitutes an offer, contract, or part of a contract of sale.
Chinese (ZH): hibiscus2.com 是由授权房地产经纪人（"我们"）为 Lexis Hibiscus 2（Port Dickson）制作的营销资料，并非发展商官方网站。本网站所载内容概不构成要约、合约，或买卖合约的一部分。
2. 效果图与影像

English: All renders on this website are artist impressions. The final development, landscaping, facilities, finishes and views may vary from what is depicted. Where actual show unit photography is used, it reflects the specific unit photographed and may not represent every villa type.
Chinese (ZH): 本网站所有效果图均为艺术构想图。最终发展项目、景观设计、设施、装修及景观可能与图示有所不同。如使用实际样板房照片，该照片仅反映所拍摄的特定单位，未必代表所有别墅户型。
3. 价格、供应情况与规格

English: Prices, unit availability, sizes and specifications shown are indicative and subject to change without notice. Official, current figures are confirmed only in the sale and purchase agreement and related official documentation issued by the developer.
Chinese (ZH): 网站所示价格、单位供应情况、面积及规格仅供参考，如有更改，恕不另行通知。官方及最新数据仅以发展商所发出的买卖合约及相关正式文件为准。
4. 租赁计划

English: Any description of the rental programme on this website is a summary only. Programme details are subject to the official sale and tenancy/leaseback agreements. Rental programme terms, availability and conditions may change according to official agreements and project requirements. Interested buyers should review the complete terms with the authorised sales representative before making any decision.
Chinese (ZH): 本网站有关租赁计划的描述仅为概要说明。计划详情以正式的买卖及租赁／回租协议为准。租赁计划条款、供应情况及条件可能根据正式协议及项目要求而有所变动。有意买家在作出任何决定前，应与授权销售代表一同审阅完整条款。
5. 非财务建议

English: This website is marketing material and does not constitute financial, investment, legal or tax advice. Prospective buyers should seek independent legal and financial counsel before entering into any transaction.
Chinese (ZH): 本网站为营销资料，不构成财务、法律或税务建议。准买家在进行任何交易前，应寻求独立的法律与财务咨询。
Notes: FLAGGED: ZH drops "investment" from the enumerated advice types (投资 is banned). Apply equivalent substitution for MS ("pelaburan" banned) and JA (投資 banned) — see TRANSLATION-TASK.md

Chinese (ZH): 6. 错误与遗漏

English: While we take reasonable care to keep information accurate, this website is provided on an "as is" basis and information is correct at time of publication only, subject to change (E&OE — errors and omissions excepted).
Chinese (ZH): 我们已采取合理措施确保信息准确，惟本网站内容以"现状"提供，所载信息仅在发布当时正确，如有更改，恕不另行通知（E&OE——错漏除外）。
7. 第三方链接

Chinese (ZH): 本网站所载任何第三方链接（如 WhatsApp）仅为方便用户而提供。我们概不对第三方服务的内容或做法负责。
